Elementos/stop/offset.name: offset
Elementos/stop/offset.description: This attribute defines where the gradient stop is placed along the gradient vector.Value type:<number>|<percentage>;Default value:0;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines where the gradient stop is placed along the gradient vector.Value type:<number>|<percentage>;Default value:0;Animatable:yes

Elementos/marker/orient.name: orient
Elementos/marker/orient.description: This attribute defines the orientation of the marker relative to the shape it is attached to.Value type:auto|auto-start-reverse|<angle>;Default value:0;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the orientation of the marker relative to the shape it is attached to.Value type:auto|auto-start-reverse|<angle>;Default value:0;Animatable:yes
